items.feature: Flexible: +1 to Evasion
items.name: Armadura de Gambeson

items.feature: Heavy: -1 to Evasion
items.name: Armadura de Cota de Malha

items.feature: Very Heavy: -2 to Evasion; -1 to Agility
items.name: Armadura de Placas Completa

items.feature: Flexible: +1 to Evasion
items.name: Armadura de Gambeson Melhorada

items.feature: Heavy: -1 to Evasion
items.name: Armadura de Cota de Malha Melhorada

items.feature: Very Heavy: -2 to Evasion; -1 to Agility
items.name: Armadura de Placas Completa Melhorada

items.feature: Warded: You reduce incoming magic damage by your Armor Score before applying it to your damage thresholds.
items.name: Armadura de Cota de Malha Elundriana

items.feature: Resilient: Before you mark your last Armor Slot, roll a d6. On a result of 6, reduce the severity by one threshold without marking an Armor Slot.
items.name: Armadura Harrowbone

items.feature: Reinforced: When you mark your last Armor Slot, increase your damage thresholds by +2 until you clear at least 1 Armor Slot.
items.name: Armadura de Peitoral Irontree

items.feature: Shifting: When you are targeted for an attack, you can mark an Armor Slot to give the attack roll against you disadvantage.
items.name: Armadura Flutuante Runetan

items.feature: Quiet: You gain a +2 bonus to rolls you make to move silently.
items.name: Armadura Macia de Tyris

items.feature: Hopeful: When you would spend a Hope, you can mark an Armor Slot instead.
items.name: Armadura Rosewild

items.feature: Flexible: +1 to Evasion
items.name: Armadura de Gambeson Avançada

items.feature: Heavy: -1 to Evasion
items.name: Armadura de Cota de Malha Avançada

items.feature: Very Heavy: -2 to Evasion; -1 to Agility
items.name: Armadura de Placas Completa Avançada

items.feature: Gilded: +1 to Presence
items.name: Armadura Fina Bellamoi

items.feature: Impenetrable: Once per short rest, when you would mark your last Hit Point, you can instead mark a Stress.
items.name: Armadura de Escamas de Dragão

items.feature: Sharp: On a successful attack against a target within Melee range, add a d4 to the damage roll.
items.name: Armadura de Placas com Espinhos

items.feature: Physical: You can't mark an Armor Slot to reduce magic damage.
items.name: Armadura Bladefare

items.feature: Magic: You can't mark an Armor Slot to reduce physical damage.
items.name: Manto de Guarda Mágica

items.feature: Painful: Each time you mark an Armor Slot, you must mark a Stress.
items.name: Runas de Fortificação

items.feature: Flexible: +1 to Evasion
items.name: Armadura de Gambeson Lendária

items.feature: Heavy: -1 to Evasion
items.name: Armadura de Cota de Malha Lendária

items.feature: Very Heavy: -2 to Evasion; -1 to Agility
items.name: Armadura de Placas Completa Lendária

items.feature: Timeslowing: Mark an Armor Slot to roll a d4 and add its result as a bonus to your Evasion against an incoming attack.
items.name: Cota de Seda Dunamis

items.feature: Channeling: +1 to Spellcast Rolls
items.name: Armadura de Canalização

items.feature: Burning: When an adversary attacks you within Melee range, they mark a Stress.
items.name: Armadura de Trama de Brasa

items.feature: Fortified: When you mark an Armor Slot, you reduce the severity of an attack by two thresholds instead of one.
items.name: Armadura Totalmente Fortificada

items.feature: Truthseeking: This armor glows when another creature within Close range tells a lie.
items.name: Armadura de Opala Veritas

items.feature: Difficult: -1 to all character traits and Evasion
items.name: Cota de Malha do Salvador
